text.title: Twitter X Monetization Thread To Product Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Twitter X Monetization Thread To Product application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Funnel MUST cite ≥3 evidence threads with audience-validated topic; funnels without signal are rejected.
rule.rationale: Distribution-first only works when the signal precedes the build; without signal it's hopeful broadcasting.

rule.statement: Funnel thread MUST be 7-tweet shape ending with email-gate CTA; ad-hoc shapes are rejected.
Email-gate MUST offer a derivative asset (PDF/template/kit) tied to the thread topic; 'subscribe to my newsletter' is rejected.
rule.rationale: Generic newsletter signups convert 5-10x lower than derivative-asset gates.

rule.statement: Funnel MUST terminate at a paid product OR pre-order URL; funnels without endpoint are rejected.
rule.rationale: Email lists without product are technical debt; the funnel needs a destination from day one.

rule.statement: Welcome sequence MUST be ≥5 emails with product CTA in email 4; single-email follow-ups are rejected.
rule.rationale: 5-email sequences convert 3-5x better than single emails; email 4 is the highest open-rate window.
